## Report Type

- Comparison report
- RAG report
- TraceCard report
- OTel export
- Other:

## Feedback

What was useful, confusing, missing, or hard to trust?

## Decision Context

What decision were you trying to make from the report?

## Privacy Note

Do not attach private reports with real prompts, responses, retrieved documents, customer data, or API metadata. Use synthetic or redacted examples only.
